root_cause: Between 07:15 on 08 Apr 2017 and 04:00 UTC on 11 Apr 2017, customers using Azure IoT Suite may have been unable to provision solutions. Engineers recommended deploying from an MSbuild prompt using code at https://aka.ms/rms_git. Existing resources were not impacted.
